languages.text: {n}Некоторое время в {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксе{/g} слышно лишь шипение, а потом звук становится неожиданно четким. Раздавшийся голос не принадлежит человеку — с вами говорит ксенос эльдар.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Мон-кай{/g}, это — наше последнее предупреждение. Оставьте орбиту обреченного мира и уходите прочь. Здесь свершится наша месть над древним врагом — на этом мире не останется выживших".

traits.locale_text: {n}Некоторое время в {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксе{/g} слышно лишь шипение, а потом звук становится неожиданно четким. Раздавшийся голос не принадлежит человеку — с вами говорит ксенос-эльдар.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Мон-кай{/g}, это — наше первое и последнее предупреждение. Оставьте орбиту обреченного мира и уходите прочь. Пророчество указало на место, где глупость мон-кай привела к пробуждению древнего зла, и мы не дадим вам еще больше распалить его гнев своим повторным вмешательством".

languages.text: {n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."
languages.original_text: {n}Некоторое время в {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксе{/g} слышно лишь шипение, а потом звук становится неожиданно четким. Раздавшийся голос не принадлежит человеку — с вами говорит ксенос эльдар.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Мон-кай{/g}, это — наше последнее предупреждение. Оставьте орбиту обреченного мира и уходите прочь. Здесь свершится наша месть над древним врагом — на этом мире не останется выживших".

traits.locale_text: {n}For a while, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, and then the sound becomes suddenly clear. The voice that comes out is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, our revenge against the ancient enemy shall take place. This world will bear no survivors."

{n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."

{n}For a while, you hear nothing but static from the vox, and then the sound becomes suddenly clear. The voice that comes out is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "Mon-keigh, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Prophecy has pointed to the place where mon-keigh folly has led to the awakening of an ancient evil, and we will not let you inflame its wrath further with your repeated interference."

Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, our revenge against the ancient enemy shall take place. This world will bear no survivors."

The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."

languages.text: {n}しばらくはヴォックスからノイズしか聞こえないが、突然クリアな音声になる。それは人間の声ではなく、異星人の声である。エイルダーリが話す。{/n}「モンケィ、これは我々の最初の警告であり、最後の警告である。滅びゆくこの惑星の軌道から去れ。予言は、モンケィの愚かな行為が古代の悪の目覚めを引き起こした場所を指し示している。我々は、君たちの繰り返しによる干渉でその怒りをさらに煽ることを許さない」
languages.original_text: {n}For a while, you hear nothing but static from the vox, and then the sound becomes suddenly clear. The voice that comes out is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "Mon-keigh, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Prophecy has pointed to the place where mon-keigh folly has led to the awakening of an ancient evil, and we will not let you inflame its wrath further with your repeated interference."

languages.text: {n}Bir an için {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vokstan{/g} parazitten başka bir şey duymuyorsun. Ardından ses aniden netleşiyor. Konuşan ses bir insana ait değil. Bu bir zeno, bir Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, bu ilk ve son uyarımızdır. Lanetli dünyanın yörüngesini terk edip gidin. Burada kadim düşmandan intikamımızı alacağız. Bu dünyada hayatta kalan kimse olmayacak."
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir an için {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vokstan{/g} parazitten başka bir şey duymuyorsun. Ardından ses aniden netleşiyor. Konuşan ses bir insana ait değil. Bu bir zeno, bir Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, bu ilk ve son uyarımızdır. Lanetli dünyanın yörüngesini terk edip gidin. Burada kadim düşmandan intikamımızı alacağız. Bu dünyada hayatta kalan kimse olmayacak."

languages.text: {n}有那么一瞬间，{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}里只能听到一片静电杂音，接着声音骤然清晰。传来的声音并非人类，而是异形，一个艾达灵族。{/n}“{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}，这是我们第一次，也是最后一次警告。离开这颗注定毁灭的世界的轨道，滚远点。我们将在此向那古老的宿敌复仇。这个世界不会留下任何活口。”
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."

traits.locale_text: {n}有那么一瞬间，{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}里只能听到一片静电杂音，接着声音骤然清晰。传来的声音并非人类，而是异形，一个艾达灵族。{/n}“{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}，这是我们第一次，也是最后一次警告。离开这颗注定毁灭的世界的轨道，滚远点。我们将在此向那古老的宿敌复仇。这个世界不会留下任何活口。”

languages.text: {n}Zunächst hörst du aus dem {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g} nur statisches Rauschen, dann ist die Übertragung plötzlich klar. Die Stimme, die ertönt, ist nicht menschlich ... sie stammt von einem Xenos, einem Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}, das ist unsere erste und letzte Warnung. Verlasst auf der Stelle den Orbit der todgeweihten Welt. Hier werden wir am alten Feind Rache nehmen. Es wird keine Überlebenden geben."
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zunächst hörst du aus dem {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g} nur statisches Rauschen, dann ist die Übertragung plötzlich klar. Die Stimme, die ertönt, ist nicht menschlich ... sie stammt von einem Xenos, einem Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}, das ist unsere erste und letzte Warnung. Verlasst auf der Stelle den Orbit der todgeweihten Welt. Hier werden wir am alten Feind Rache nehmen. Es wird keine Überlebenden geben."

languages.text: {n}L'espace de quelques instants, vous n'entendez rien d'autre sur le {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}canal-vox{/g} que les crépitements d'interférences, puis la communication s'éclaircit subitement. La voix qui s'élève du récepteur n'est pas humaine, c'est celle d'un xénos, un Aeldari.{/n} « Premier et dernier avertissement, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Quittez l'orbite de ce monde condamné et disparaissez. Ce lieu sera le théâtre de notre vengeance contre l'ennemi ancien. Il n'y aura aucun survivant. »
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you hear nothing but static from the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}, then the sound suddenly becomes clear. The voice that emerges is not human — it is a xenos speaking, an Aeldari.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, this is our first and final warning. Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'espace de quelques instants, vous n'entendez rien d'autre sur le {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}canal-vox{/g} que les crépitements d'interférences, puis la communication s'éclaircit subitement. La voix qui s'élève du récepteur n'est pas humaine, c'est celle d'un xénos, un Aeldari.{/n} « Premier et dernier avertissement, {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Quittez l'orbite de ce monde condamné et disparaissez. Ce lieu sera le théâtre de notre vengeance contre l'ennemi ancien. Il n'y aura aucun survivant. »

languages.text: {n}Durante un momento, solo escuchas estática por el {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}, y entonces el sonido se vuelve claro. La voz que emerge no es humana: habla un xenos, un Aeldari.{/n} «{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Mon-keigh{/g}, esta es nuestra primera y última amenaza. Abandona la órbita de ese mundo condenado y aléjate. Aquí cobraremos venganza contra el enemigo ancestral. No habrá supervivientes».

Leave the orbit of the doomed world and begone. Here, we shall exact our revenge against the ancient enemy. This world will bear no survivors."
